zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford於1441年出生在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德時，他的父親Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford12歲，母親Margaret Moleyns19歲。他於1472年與Jane Bulstrode在英國薩默塞特格福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1516年5月29日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford于1441年出生在英国薩默塞特法爾 格福德时，他的父亲Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford12岁，母亲Margaret Moleyns19岁。他于1472年与Jane Bulstrode在英国薩默塞特格福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1516年5月29日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特法爾 格福德。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford was born in 1441, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, his father, Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford, was 12 and his mother, Margaret Moleyns, was 19. He married Jane Bulstrode in 1472, in Hungerford, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 May 1516, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford est né en 1441, à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Margaret Moleyns, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Jane Bulstrode en 1472, à Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1516, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford 1441 in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford 12 und seine Mutter Margaret Moleyns 19. Er hat 1472 in Hungerford, Somerset, England Jane Bulstrode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Mai 1516 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford è nato il nel 1441 nel Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Moleyns, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Jane Bulstrode nel 1472, nel Hungerford, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 maggio 1516, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England.

ja.Hungerford, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトハンジャーフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerfordが1441年にイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで生まれた時，父Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerfordは12歳，母Margaret Moleynsは19歳であった。1472年にイギリスソメルセトハンジャーフォードでJane Bulstrodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1516年5月29日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford(이)가 1441년 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Moleyns(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1472년 영국 서머세트 헌그르퍼드에서 Jane Bulstrode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1516년 5월 29일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford nasceu em 1441, em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Moleyns, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Bulstrode em 1472, em Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1516, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford родился в 1441 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moleyns, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Bulstrode в 1472 г. в местности хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 мая 1516 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford nació en 1441, en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Margaret Moleyns, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Jane Bulstrode en 1472, en Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1516, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra.
